github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This is AI CRM v3 — Node.js Express CRM for Indian web design agency. Uses Twilio for calls/WhatsApp, Nodemailer for email, Google Calendar for meetings, Telegram Bot for control. Database is ./data/leads.json (JSON file, no external DB). All customer-facing text must be in Hinglish. Phone numbers stored as 10 digits (no +91). Call hours: 10AM-6PM IST only. Always use db.read() fresh — never cache. Always wrap external API calls in retryService.withRetry(). See CLAUDE.md for complete architecture.
